subcodes.first_line: O thou recipient of divine favors! The flowing verses, which were like the melodies of a thousand eloquent nightingales in spring, were recited [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قابل الطاف الهی اشعار آبدار که چون الحان هزار ربیع فصیح و بدیع بود تلاوت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @music and singing, @review of publications, @firmness in the Covenant
